items.title: MSGS Stock Hits Record High As Board Backs Plan To Spin Off Knicks, Rangers Franchises
items.description: The company said its board unanimously approved a plan to explore a spin-off of its New York Knicks and New York Rangers businesses into two separatel...

items.title: Google Launches Its Latest Affordable Phone At $499
items.description: The Pixel 10a is part of the company’s A-series that brings many of Google’s AI tools at a more affordable price point compared to the Pixel 10 series...

items.title: Coinbase’s App Could Add Self-Custody, CEO Brian Armstrong Reveals
items.description: CEO Armstrong said the rollout would require a "major architectural lift" due to deep technical dependencies.

items.title: Moderna Stock Gains After FDA Accepts Company’s Revised Flu Vaccine Application For Review
items.description: The FDA has now accepted the biologics license application for review, setting a Prescription Drug User Fee Act goal date of Aug. 5, 2026.

items.title: Hyperliquid Launches New DeFi Policy Center In Washington DC
items.description: The report states that the policy center will legalize perpetual derivatives and help regulators write DeFi guidelines for the financial system.
